name: Godot
description: Free and open source 2D and 3D game engine.

binary.command: curl -LO https://downloads.tuxfamily.org/godotengine/4.3/Godot_v4.3-stable_linux.x86_64.zip && unzip Godot_v4.3-stable_linux.x86_64.zip && sudo mv Godot_v4.3-stable_linux.x86_64 /usr/local/bin/godot && rm -f Godot_v4.3-stable_linux.x86_64.zip

name: Blender
description: Free and open source 3D creation suite for modeling, animation, rendering.

name: Unity Hub
description: Management tool for installing and managing Unity Editor versions.

binary.command: curl -LO https://public-cdn.cloud.unity3d.com/hub/prod/UnityHub.AppImage && chmod +x UnityHub.AppImage && sudo mv UnityHub.AppImage /usr/local/bin/unity-hub

name: GDevelop
description: Open-source, cross-platform game engine designed for everyone.

name: Defold
description: Completely free to use game engine for development of desktop, mobile and web games.

binary.command: curl -LO https://github.com/defold/defold/releases/download/1.9.2/Defold-x86_64-linux.zip && unzip Defold-x86_64-linux.zip && sudo mv Defold /usr/local/bin/defold

name: Bevy
description: Data-driven game engine built in Rust using the ECS pattern.

name: love2d
description: Framework for making 2D games in Lua.

name: Tiled
description: Flexible level editor for tile-based games.

name: Aseprite
description: Animated sprite editor and pixel art tool.

name: OBS Studio
description: Free and open source software for video recording and live streaming.

name: Wine
description: Compatibility layer capable of running Windows applications on Linux.

name: Lutris
description: Open source gaming platform for GNU/Linux.

name: RetroArch
description: Frontend for emulators, game engines and media players.

name: Dolphin Emulator
description: Emulator for Nintendo GameCube and Wii.

name: itch.io
description: Platform for indie game distribution and community.

binary.command: curl -LO https://itch.io/app/download?platform=linux && tar -xzf itch-setup && sudo mv itch-setup /usr/local/bin/itch
